## Check type ID

`kind: filesystem_extension_in`

## Purpose

Allow only specific file extensions.

## Configuration keys

| Field | Required | Default | Meaning |
|---|---|---|---|
| `values` | yes | — | Allowed extensions, including the leading dot. |

## Example

```yaml
collections:
  notes:
    path: notes
    pattern: "*"
    checks:
      - kind: filesystem_extension_in
        values: [.md, .markdown]
```
